name: CircleCI
description: Monitor CircleCI pipelines and contexts for CI/CD code changes and secrets management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to CircleCI
2. Go to User Settings > Personal API Tokens
3. Click 'Create New Token'
4. Copy and paste the token below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create a Personal API Token in CircleCI > User Settings > Personal API Tokens

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Lists CircleCI pipelines to verify code changes are tracked

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies that CircleCI contexts are configured for secure secrets management
